topic: Area C: The World Around Us
subject: german

items.why: Students guess from a similar word; Recycling is a core environment term in this topic.

items.q: How do you say 'it is sunny'?
items.why: Students use the wrong subject; German weather uses impersonal 'es ist' + adjective.

items.q: Which is an environmentally friendly form of transport?
items.why: Students don't connect vocabulary to the environment; cycling reduces pollution.
Correct answer: Traffic and industry. “Recycling” sounds right because it borrows the language of the topic — but it fails this question. Re-read the notes on why.
